rag_rules: Fix 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by resolving root identifier references or removing invalid clauses
Ensure AGREE type declarations use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
generic_rules: Validate that all AGREE expressions resolve to valid types before execution
Only reference visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq for type-annotated expressions and const for type-annotated values
AGREE requires explicit type annotations for all helpers and constants
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type vs implementation scope placement rules
